title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
summary: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, achieving a $1.2 billion valuation. The funding validates the growing market for AI-powered legal technology solutions.
content: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Kholsa Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.

zh.title: AI法律初创公司Norm融资1.2亿美元，达到独角兽估值
zh.summary: AI法律初创公司Norm在Khosla Ventures领投的C轮融资中融得1.2亿美元，估值达12亿美元。这笔融资验证了AI驱动的法律科技解决方案市场的增长潜力。

title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
summary: Bidbus, a platform enabling dealerships to bid competitively on used cars, has raised $15 million in Series A funding led by Ibex Investors. The startup addresses the used car market by introducing auction mechanics between dealers.
content: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.

zh.title: 这家初创公司让经销商竞价您的二手车
zh.summary: Bidbus是一个让经销商竞价二手车的平台，已获得由Ibex Investors领投的1500万美元A轮融资。这家初创公司通过在经销商之间引入拍卖机制来解决二手车市场问题。

title: iRobot’s newest floor cleaner isn’t a robot
summary: iRobot has launched the Roomba Electro Plus, a $399 manual floor cleaner combining vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting for hard floors, marking the company's first non-robotic product. The company simultaneously announced five new robot vacuum models with improved suction, smaller designs, and lower prices.
content:
The Roomba Electro Plus is iRobot’s first manually-operated floor cleaner. | Image: iRobot	

iRobot just announced its first ever non-robotic floor cleaner. The $399 Roomba Electro Plus is a 5-in-1 hard-floor cleaner that combines vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting, but you have to operate it yourself. The company also announced updates to its line of Roomba robot vacuums, launching five new models with higher suction power, smaller footprints, and lower prices. These largely replace the line that arrived in 2025. 
Designed exclusively for hard floors, the new Electro Plus is similar to the new breed of manual wet-dry floor cleaners available from Dreame, Roborock, and others. iRobot's distinguishing feature is Electro's ability  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: iRobot最新款地板清洁器不是机器人
zh.summary: iRobot推出了价格为399美元的Roomba Electro Plus，这是一款结合了吸尘、拖地和消毒功能的手动地板清洁器，标志着该公司推出了首款非机器人产品。该公司同时推出了五款新型机器人吸尘器，具有更强的吸力、更小的尺寸和更低的价格。

title: Microsoft fixes storage-hogging Windows 11 folder
summary: Microsoft has patched a Windows 11 bug where the CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file consumed excessive storage, with some users reporting files growing to 500GB. The fix was included in the optional June 2026 update to improve disk space usage.
content:
Microsoft is addressing a Windows 11 bug that caused a folder to take up several gigabytes of storage space. As spotted earlier by Windows Latest, Microsoft included the patch in its optional  June 2026 update (KB5095093), which "improves disk space usage for the CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file."
The CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file is installed on Windows 11 PCs by default, and is related to app permissions. Several users have had issues with this file over the past few months, with one person saying the file took up 500GB of storage on their device. Others have reported the file growing to similarly large amounts, ranging from 12GB …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软修复占用大量存储空间的Windows 11文件夹
zh.summary: 微软已修复Windows 11的一个错误，该错误导致CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal文件占用过多存储空间，一些用户报告文件增长到500GB。该修复已包含在可选的2026年6月更新中，以改善磁盘空间使用情况。

title: Hacktivists call out Trump by hacking and defacing US Army websites
summary: Hacktivists breached two U.S. Army websites and defaced them with messages calling President Trump derogatory names. The Army has since fixed the compromised websites.
content: The U.S. Army has fixed two of its websites that were hacked to display messages calling President Trump a "pedophile" and a "thief."

zh.title: 黑客激进分子通过黑客攻击和破坏美国陆军网站来呼吁特朗普
zh.summary: 黑客激进分子入侵了两个美国陆军网站，并用谩骂特朗普总统的信息对其进行了篡改。陆军随后修复了受损网站。

title: Solos debuts an even lighter version of its camera-less smart glasses
summary: Solos announced the AirGo A6 smart glasses, weighing around 19 grams—half the weight of last year's A5 model—and featuring voice-controlled AI without cameras. The lighter design is achieved through thinner temple arms and improved internal engineering.
content:
The AirGo A6 are available in multiple designs including several transparent color options. | Image: Solos	

Solos announced a new version of its AirGo smart glasses, one that forgoes cameras for a sleeker design and an AI assistant that relies on voice interactions. Last year's AirGo A5 weighed 36 to 40 grams depending on the frame style, but the new AirGo A6 weigh around 19 grams. Part of the weight savings comes from thinner temple arms housing speakers, batteries, and other electronics. For comparison, the new Meta Glasses announced last month weigh around 54 to nearly 60 grams depending on the style.
Pricing and availability for the new AirGo A6 hasn't been finalized yet, but the smart glasses will support "full prescription lens compatibilit …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Solos推出更轻版本的无摄像头智能眼镜
zh.summary: Solos宣布推出AirGo A6智能眼镜，重约19克—是去年A5型号重量的一半—具有无摄像头的语音控制人工智能功能。更轻的设计通过更细的镜腿和改进的内部工程实现。

title: Google Search lets creators know more about their reach
summary: Google is introducing a "platform properties" feature in Google Search Console that allows creators to track how people discover their social media and YouTube content through search. The feature shows which search terms drive traffic and how audiences interact with posts.
content:
Google is going to give content creators and website owners a better idea of how people find their social media profiles and YouTube content through Search. With a new feature in the Google Search Console called "platform properties," Google says that you'll be able to "easily track which search terms lead people to your Instagram, TikTok, X and YouTube content on Search, and see exactly how your audience is interacting with your posts," according to a blog post.
The new feature continues Google's push to make Search more of a hub for everything creators and publishers do online. In June, Google started letting big creators and publishers c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌搜索帮助创作者了解内容覆盖范围
zh.summary: 谷歌在谷歌搜索控制台中推出了"平台属性"功能,允许创作者追踪人们如何通过搜索发现他们的社交媒体和YouTube内容。该功能显示哪些搜索词驱动流量以及受众如何与帖子互动。

title: iFixit has a new toolkit for fixing appliances, building furniture, and household repairs
summary: iFixit has launched the $34.95 Megalodon Driver Kit, a compact toolkit designed for household repairs and DIY projects rather than electronics. The kit features a new screwdriver with a Swivel Grip Cap designed as an improvement over traditional ratcheting drivers.
content:
iFixit is best known for its detailed gadget teardowns and toolkits designed to help you crack open and troubleshoot your own electronics. Today it announced a new toolkit that's instead tailored to household repairs or DIY projects like fixing appliances or assembling flat-packed furniture. iFixit describes its $34.95 Megalodon Driver Kit as a "compact kit for the modern home" and it includes a new screwdriver the company designed to be a better alternative to traditional ratcheting drivers.
The star of the show is the Megalodon driver featuring a bright blue end cap iFixit calls the Swivel Grip Cap. The screwdriver is able to spin freely  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: iFixit推出用于修理电器、组装家具和家庭维修的新工具包
zh.summary: iFixit推出了售价34.95美元的巨齿鲨螺丝刀套件,这是一个为家庭维修和DIY项目设计的紧凑工具包。该套件采用了新型螺丝刀,配有旋转握把盖,旨在改进传统的棘轮驱动程序。

title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
summary: Savi has raised $7 million in seed funding and is launching an app to help consumers identify and protect themselves from realistic AI scams, such as deepfake kidnapping ransom demands. The app will be available on iPhone and Android.
content: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

zh.title: Savi应用旨在保护消费者免受逼真的AI诈骗,如绑匪勒索赎金
zh.summary: Savi融资700万美元的种子融资,正在推出一款应用程序,帮助消费者识别和保护自己免受逼真的AI诈骗,例如深度伪造绑架赎金要求。该应用将在iPhone和Android平台上提供。

title: Marshall upgrades the bass and repairability of two wireless speakers
summary: Marshall announced new versions of the Acton IV and Stanmore IV Bluetooth speakers with upgraded tweeters, bass ports, and improved sound design. Both models emphasize repairability with replaceable components including knobs, feet, and front grills.
content:
The knobs and other parts on the Stanmore IV and Acton IV speakers are replaceable. | Image: Marshall	

Marshall announced new versions of its Acton and Stanmore Bluetooth speakers today with upgraded tweeters, bass ports, and internal designs that improve their ability to fill a room with sound. Both the Acton IV and Stanmore IV replace their four-year-old predecessors with a new focus on repairability. Parts including knobs, feet, and the speakers' front grills bearing the iconic Marshall logo are replaceable should they get damaged.
The smaller Acton IV, featuring a 4-inch woofer and a pair of 0.75-inch tweeters, is available starting today for $299.99 through Marshall's online store. The Stanmore IV, which has a similar driver setup but w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Marshall升级两款无线音箱的低音和可维修性
zh.summary: Marshall发布了Acton IV和Stanmore IV蓝牙音箱的新版本，配备改进的高音扬声器、低音端口和更好的音质设计。两款型号都强调可维修性，具有可更换的组件，包括旋钮、脚和前挡板。

title: Xbox’s bold plan for the future sounds nearly impossible
summary: Microsoft announced a major Xbox restructuring that CEO Asha Sharma described as "the most significant in Xbox history," though she also stated ambitions to entertain over a billion people daily. The layoffs reflect Xbox's ongoing struggles despite billions in investment.
content:
It's another bad week for the video game industry. Microsoft outlined a series of layoffs on Monday that Xbox CEO Asha Sharma described as "the most significant restructure in Xbox history." But buried in Sharma's memo was a curiously optimistic statement: "I want Xbox to be one of the few companies that entertains more than a billion people each day and gives everyone the opportunity to create and connect," she wrote. 
Xbox has been a shambling mess after Microsoft spent billions of dollars with little to show for it, and now it aims to reach a much bigger audience with a much smaller team, amid one of the most challenging times in the ind …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox未来的大胆计划听起来几乎不可能实现
zh.summary: 微软宣布进行重大Xbox重组，首席执行官Asha Sharma将其描述为"Xbox历史上最重要的"，尽管她也表示了娱乐10亿多人的雄心。裁员反映了Xbox尽管投入数十亿美元仍在持续的困境。

title: ULA's last six Atlas Vs can't launch anything besides Boeing's Starliner
summary: United Launch Alliance's remaining six Atlas V rockets are committed exclusively to launching Boeing's Starliner. Meanwhile, Amazon reports it has enough satellites in orbit to begin initial broadband service at mid-latitudes later this year.
content: Amazon says it has enough satellites in orbit to begin initial broadband service at mid-latitudes later this year.

zh.title: ULA最后的六枚Atlas V火箭只能发射波音Starliner
zh.summary: 联合发射联盟剩余的六枚Atlas V火箭专门用于发射波音Starliner。与此同时，亚马逊报告称其在轨卫星数量足以在今年晚些时候在中纬度地区开始初步宽带服务。

title: How AI could enable autonomous robot workers in workplaces—and maybe homes
summary: Top robotics researchers and founders discuss how AI is advancing robot autonomy for potential workplace and home applications. The analysis explores the technological developments enabling more independent robotic systems.
content: Top robotics researchers and founders explain how robot autonomy is evolving.

zh.title: 人工智能如何在工作场所实现自主机器人工人——甚至可能在家中
zh.summary: 顶级机器人研究人员和创始人讨论了人工智能如何推进机器人自主性，为工作场所和家庭应用带来潜力。该分析探讨了支撑更独立机器人系统的技术发展。

title: Are you ready for what it takes to stop ghost guns?
summary: The article examines efforts to regulate 3D-printed firearms, citing a case where a former Army National Guard member was arrested for allegedly manufacturing illegal machine gun conversion switches and firearm components. Federal prosecutors continue targeting the manufacturing and distribution of untraceable weapons.
content:
In the summer of 2024, former Army National Guard member Andrew Scott Hastings spent a sweaty afternoon carefully packing boxes with parts he made using his 3D printer. These weren't novelty figurines or replacement Ikea pieces. The boxes were instead filled with a handful of homemade firearm lower receivers and more than 100 "switches," small devices capable of converting a semiautomatic gun into a fully automatic weapon. Their intended recipients, federal prosecutors allege, were al-Qaida operatives.
Months later ATF agents busted two men in Colorado Springs for allegedly using 3D printers to churn out hundreds of illegal machine gun conv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你准备好了吗：止住幽灵枪需要什么
zh.summary: 该文章审视了监管3D打印枪支的努力，引用了一位前陆军国民警卫队成员因涉嫌制造非法机关枪转换开关和枪支部件而被逮捕的案例。联邦检察官继续打击不可追踪武器的制造和销售。

title: Nothing’s first B-series phone is also skipping the US
summary: Nothing unveiled the Phone 4B, a budget-tier device that borrows design elements from the 4A line but uses plastic instead of metal construction. Following the brand's naming convention, the Phone 4B skips the US market, similar to previous budget Nothing devices.
content:
Nothing is shaking up the branding of its cheapest phones, following up last year's Phone 3A Lite with a new Phone 4B. Combining design elements of the 4A and 4A Pro, it follows Nothing's previous cheaper handsets in skipping the US market.
The company already uses the "A" branding to market its cheaper tier of products, and the first "B" phone sits another level below that. The 4B seemingly replaces the naming convention used for last year's Phone 3A Lite.
Design-wise, it borrows a little from the two 4A phones, which launched in March this year. The unibody look is similar to the 4A Pro, though now in plastic rather than metal, but it pa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nothing首款B系列手机同样跳过美国市场
zh.summary: Nothing推出了Phone 4B，这是一款采用4A系列设计元素但使用塑料而非金属外壳的中端设备。遵循该品牌的命名惯例，Phone 4B跳过了美国市场，与之前的Nothing预算产品类似。

title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 American autonomous ground vehicles to Ukraine, marking the first large-scale deployment of U.S. military robots in active combat. This milestone demonstrates the growing role of autonomous systems in modern warfare and represents a significant step toward broader adoption of unmanned ground vehicles in conflict zones.

zh.title: 第一批美国自主地面车辆在乌克兰参战
zh.summary: Forterra公司已向乌克兰部署了100多辆美国自主地面车辆，标志着美国军用机器人首次大规模部署在实际战斗中。这一里程碑事件展示了自主系统在现代战争中作用的日益增长，代表了无人地面车辆在冲突地区更广泛应用的重要一步。

title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
summary: Netflix viewers increasingly aren't returning for subsequent seasons, undermining the platform's core competitive advantage of binge-ready content. The article examines how binge-watching as a viewing model may have lost strategic importance amid growing competition and shifting audience preferences.
content: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.

zh.title: Netflix创造了追剧文化。现在它自己可能已经超越了这一模式
zh.summary: Netflix观众越来越少地回来追看后续季节，削弱了该平台的核心竞争优势——即时可追看的内容。该文章探讨了在日益激烈的竞争和观众偏好转变的背景下，追剧观看作为一种观看模式如何可能已经失去了战略重要性。
